content.text:
[cron:agent-network-health-hourly agent-network-health-check] AGENT NETWORK HEALTH CHECK: Query Supabase agent_metrics table for all agents. Report: 1) Agents with heartbeat > 30 min stale. 2) Error rates above 5%. 3) Response times above threshold. 4) Memory utilization. Escalate critical issues to d1_cto. Format as Telegram-friendly summary.
Current time: Friday, March 13th, 2026 — 6:39 PM (America/Chicago) / 2026-03-13 23:39 UTC

content.name: exec

arguments.command: $h=@{apikey=$env:SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY;Authorization="Bearer $($env:SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY)"}; $tables='agent_metrics','agent_health','agent_health_metrics','agent_status','agent_heartbeats','agent_runtime_metrics','agent_performance_metrics','agent_performance'; foreach($t in $tables){ try{$r=Invoke-RestMethod -Headers $h -UserAgent node -Uri "$($env:SUPABASE_URL)/rest/v1/$t?select=*&limit=1" -ErrorAction Stop; "$t OK rows=$((($r|Measure-Object).Count))" } catch { "$t ERR" }}

content.partialJson: {"command":"$h=@{apikey=$env:SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY;Authorization=\"Bearer $($env:SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY)\"}; $tables='agent_metrics','agent_health','agent_health_metrics','agent_status','agent_heartbeats','agent_runtime_metrics','agent_performance_metrics','agent_performance'; foreach($t in $tables){ try{$r=Invoke-RestMethod -Headers $h -UserAgent node -Uri \"$($env:SUPABASE_URL)/rest/v1/$t?select=*&limit=1\" -ErrorAction Stop; \"$t OK rows=$((($r|Measure-Object).Count))\" } catch { \"$t ERR\" }}"}

content.name: exec

arguments.command: $h=@{apikey=$env:SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY;Authorization="Bearer $($env:SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY)"}; $agents=Invoke-RestMethod -Headers $h -UserAgent node -Uri "$($env:SUPABASE_URL)/rest/v1/agents?select=agent_id,org_unit,last_heartbeat_at,status"; $now=[DateTimeOffset]::UtcNow; $stale=@(); foreach($a in $agents){ if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($a.last_heartbeat_at)){ $mins=$null } else { $mins=($now - [DateTimeOffset]::Parse($a.last_heartbeat_at)).TotalMinutes }; if(($mins -eq $null) -or ($mins -gt 30)){ $stale += [pscustomobject]@{agent_id=$a.agent_id;org_unit=$a.org_unit;status=$a.status;stale_minutes= if($mins -eq $null){'unknown(null)'} else {[math]::Round($mins,1)} } } }; "total_agents=$($agents.Count)"; "stale_count=$($stale.Count)"; $stale | Sort-Object org_unit,agent_id | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4

content.partialJson: {"command":"$h=@{apikey=$env:SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY;Authorization=\"Bearer $($env:SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY)\"}; $agents=Invoke-RestMethod -Headers $h -UserAgent node -Uri \"$($env:SUPABASE_URL)/rest/v1/agents?select=agent_id,org_unit,last_heartbeat_at,status\"; $now=[DateTimeOffset]::UtcNow; $stale=@(); foreach($a in $agents){ if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($a.last_heartbeat_at)){ $mins=$null } else { $mins=($now - [DateTimeOffset]::Parse($a.last_heartbeat_at)).TotalMinutes }; if(($mins -eq $null) -or ($mins -gt 30)){ $stale += [pscustomobject]@{agent_id=$a.agent_id;org_unit=$a.org_unit;status=$a.status;stale_minutes= if($mins -eq $null){'unknown(null)'} else {[math]::Round($mins,1)} } } }; \"total_agents=$($agents.Count)\"; \"stale_count=$($stale.Count)\"; $stale | Sort-Object org_unit,agent_id | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4"}
